headline: Antonin Kinsky
body: Spurs confirm Antonin Kinsky has signed a new contract.✍️ 🗣️ “I'm so happy and I can feel the trust from the Club. When I joined 18 months ago, my expectations were to fight for my place in the team and to wear this shirt every week.” Ben Jacobs (JacobsBen) Antonín Kinsky is expected to sign a new five-year contract with Spurs.🧤 —
raw_text:
Spurs confirm Antonin Kinsky has signed a new contract.✍️

🗣️ “I'm so happy and I can feel the trust from the Club. When I joined 18 months ago, my expectations were to fight for my place in the team and to wear this shirt every week.”




Ben Jacobs (@JacobsBen)

Antonín Kinsky is expected to sign a new five-year contract with Spurs.🧤





— https://nitter.net/JacobsBen/status/2070151543668854873#m
text:
